name: Doom Ward
explicitMods: 4% chance to receive additional Divination Card items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
8% chance in Heists for Orbs of Augmentation to drop as Chaos Orbs instead

name: Screams of the Desiccated
explicitMods: You have Brutal Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
You have Massive Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."
